instruction: You are continuing an AI-native Agent-as-a-Service MVP from GitHub. Read the listed files first, then continue with one small useful slice. Keep answers short and simple for Mike.
product_summary: An AI phone booking agent for home service businesses. It answers missed calls, collects job details, saves appointment requests, notifies the owner, and shows leads in a protected admin page.

known_commits: 386033e Parse spoken appointment times for reliable booking.
bf772c3 Add protected lead CSV export.

next_steps: Confirm the spoken-time parsing branch is merged and deployed to Render.
Run one live Vapi call with a natural phrase like Friday at nine in the morning.
Confirm exactly one lead appears in the protected lead viewer.
Confirm the protected CSV export works live.
Confirm owner WhatsApp or SMS notification arrives, or diagnose Twilio logs.
Then choose the next slice: durable storage or real calendar booking.
rules: Work one small slice at a time.
Never commit API keys, tokens, customer data, transcripts, or phone lists.
Update memory/decisions.md and tasks/backlog.md when decisions or status changes.
Run the smallest useful tests before committing.
Use Greptile or GrepLoop when available, but clearly say if it was not run.
Keep Mike's explanations brief and plain-English.
security_notes: LEAD_VIEWER_TOKEN protects admin and export routes.
Phone numbers, leads, transcripts, and recordings are sensitive.
Live customer messaging requires explicit approval.
Emergency or dangerous calls must be routed to human/emergency guidance, not promises.
